violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Food employee did not wash her hands before putting on gloves. Hands should be washed before putting on gloves.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Cooked chicken, prepared last week, was found not date marked. Potentially hazardous foods should be date marked to know when disposal is necessary.

Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. Testing strips were not available for dish machine sanitizer. Strips should be available to check sanitizer strength.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. Clean bowls found with food debris in storage area. Clean items should be stored in a clean location.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Single use cardboard rounds for pizza were found stored on the floor. Single use items should be stored off of the floor.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Pizza slicer was found dirty on the counter next to the pizza oven. Pizza slicers should be cleaned after each use.

Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. Chemical test strips are not available for the sanitizer used in the 3 compartment sink. Strips should be available to make sure proper strengths are used.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Single-use items were found on the floor of the kitchen. Single-use items should be stored off of the floor.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door. Restroom doors are not self-closing. Restroom doors should be self-closing.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Exposed studs, joists or rafters were not covered with smooth, nonabsorbent and easily cleanable material. Basement dry storage area has exposed studs in the ceiling and walls. Floors, walls, and ceilings should be smooth, nonabsorbent, & easily cleanable.
